text.title: User Story Mapping — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is a journey or use-case set available and will the team work in iterations?

branch.when: journey_available == true AND release_count >= 2 AND po_named == false

conclusion.verdict: build map with walking skeleton + MVP

example.trace: ENG-42 → journey available → 4 releases → PO assigned → build map
